name: diagramforce-tests
description: Two-tier regression tests for Diagramforce — both DEV-ONLY; the shipped app stays build-free and zero-runtime-dependency. (1) `npm test`: fast unit/characterization suites on Node's native runner (node:test) — NO Jest/Vitest/Babel/bundler. (2) `npm run test:e2e`: real-browser E2E (Chromium/WebKit/Firefox) via @playwright/test, booting the actual app served as static files (tests/e2e/). `type:module` so Node treats the specs as ES modules.
